mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where your every whim becomes our command!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this: I stroll into my Bank of Entitlement branch, expecting the royal treatment as always. But what do I see? A line! A line of ordinary people, not part of my elite circle, dare I say commoners, waiting for service! The nerve! I'm Hot Josh, the CEO, the VIP here! So, I do what any self-respecting entitled individual would do-I demand to speak to the manager, of course.I make a grand spectacle, waving my diamond-encrusted card, demanding immediate attention. The manager scurries over, sweat forming on his brow, and I unleash my wrath. "How dare you make me wait like one of them," I bellow, pointing dramatically at the baffled crowd. "I demand a private banker, a red carpet, and a personal harpist to entertain me while I wait!"After a moment of shock, the manager meekly complies, knowing better than to upset a loyal high-rolling customer like myself. As I settle into my plush chair, sipping my complimentary champagne and enjoying the soothing melodies of the harp, I can't help but smile smugly. Ah, the sweet taste of entitlement, always a delicious victory when you put these peasants in their place.
